violations.text: Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

Various foods were observed held at 42-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
Refrigerator (2dr) and bar cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer has an accumulation of frost buildup. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
The door to the women's toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2021
Inspector observed walk-in cooler to be in poor repair and dripping water. PIC informed; all product was moved from area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room was lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Several foods were observed held at 45-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
Date marking for chicken vegetable soup and sausage soup exceeded 7 days. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Pasta was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
Tomato's, drinks and sauce were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
Refrigerator (2 dr) and bar cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
Ambient of refrigerator (2dr) was at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC took unit out of service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration shelving has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer have an accumulation of frost build up. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
The door to the women's toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2021
The wall in the kitchen area is in poor repair, observed being held together with tape. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

Cigarettes or other personal belongings were observed stored in the food preparation area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
